title: SAP Master Data Lead
description:
Are you our next creator of change?

Do you want to be part of creating solutions for mitigating climate change? At Neste, you will be working for the world’s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel and renewable diesel. Together we will accelerate transformation for a more sustainable future.

We are looking for you,

Project Portfolio and Master Data Lead

to join our Technical Team in Neste Tuas Singapore.

In this job you will:

  • Lead a team of  Document Integrity Controllers in managing Neste Digital Assets, including SAP Master Data, Engineering Document Depository and other Information Management System (IMS) applications. 

  • Function as the Project Portfolio controller to ensure data and information are accurate in SAP, and that approval processes and governance are consistently followed.

Reasons to join

Real impact right now. We create solutions for mitigating climate change and accelerating a shift to a circular economy. We live by our values every day; we care, we have courage, we cooperate.

Safety and caring. We value safety always and everywhere. We want our work to feel good and do good. At Neste, we nurture a culture where everyone is welcome and feels safe, respected and encouraged to be their unique true selves.

Exciting growth. Transformation brings new possibilities, fostering both courage and curiosity. As a global company, collaboration is the key, and we believe in flexible, smart ways of working. We support personal development with versatile learning and career opportunities.


More about the job: 

Master Data & Document Management Leadership: 

    • Providing leadership to Document Integrity Controllers in managing life-cycle documents and SAP Master Data. 

    • Accountable for SAP Master Data integrity and act as MDG Data Owner 

    • Accountable for Document Management system integrity and accessibility by end users. 

    • Facilitate data, documents and information handover from projects and MOCs initiatives.

    • Drive continuous Improvement and clarity related to SAP MDG and document management systems, working closely with key stakeholders at site and globally.

    • Provide comprehensive support to end-users, including training, troubleshooting issues and managing system administration tasks.

2. Project Portfolio Control and Support: 

    • Supporting Asset Development and Portfolio Manager in ensuring site project portfolio is updated in SAP (PPM and PS)

    • Coordinate monthly site investment jury and portfolio review meeting.

    • Support Development Manager/Engineer in setting up project, releasing WBS, and monitoring of the project budget, schedule and resources utilisation.

    • Collaborate with cross site and global project portfolio team in implementing standardise improvement in portfolio system and processes.

    • Liaise with finance team to ensure the accuracy of the project spending and forecast.

    • Report creation and monitoring of relevant project portfolio information in Power BI

Keys to success in this role / The best combination to succeed in this role

Education: Diploma, Degree, or Master's in Engineering, Science, or Information Technology.

Experience: 7–10 years of experience in the Process Manufacturing/Engineering industry, with a minimum of 2 years of experience in people management.

Technical Expertise:

  • Strong SAP skills, particularly in Project Portfolio Management (PPM), Project System (PS), Master Data Governance (MDG), and/or Information Management System (IMS).

  • Knowledge and experience in Document Management Processes, IT, and Quality Systems. Knowledge of industry standards and regulations in this domain is an advantage.

  • Good computer and business solutions software skills; experience with SAP and Google tools is considered an advantage.

Soft Skills & Competencies:

  • Quick learner, independent, with good analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Good Communication skills to different organizational levels.

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Let’s get you started

We look forward to receiving your CV and application by 20 February 2026.

We will do our best to contact you within 2 weeks after the application time has ended. The recruitment process will include interviews and a possible aptitude assessment. The first interviews are preliminarily scheduled to take place soon. The person selected for the position must pass a health examination including a drug test. A security clearance is obtained with your consent.

Neste in brief

Neste (NESTE, Nasdaq Helsinki) creates solutions for mitigating climate change and accelerating a shift to a circular economy. The company is the world’s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and renewable diesel, enabling its customers to reduce their greenhouse gas emissions. Neste refines waste, residues and other renewable raw materials to high-quality renewable fuels at its refineries located on three continents. The company’s annual renewable fuels production capacity will be increased to 6.8 million tons in 2027.

Neste has high standards for sustainability and the company has consistently been recognized by several leading sustainability indices. In 2024, Neste's revenue stood at EUR 20.6 billion. Read more: neste.com

postedCompany.description:
We believe that it is the task of each generation to leave its children a healthier planet. To succeed in this, we create responsible choices, every day – choices that enable people to live a more sustainable life and consume fewer natural resources.

There are roughly 5,000 Neste employees in Europe, Asia and North America. We are the world’s largest producer of renewable diesel refined from waste and residues, and we are also bringing renewable solutions to the aviation and plastics industries. We are looking for the best professionals in their respective fields – people who have the will to make the world cleaner.
postedCompany.name: NESTE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
